channel.title: IBM Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by IBM Corporation (ibm).

item.title: CVE-2024-45636 · 4.1 MEDIUM — IBM Security QRadar EDR Software has a vulnerability where user credentials may be stored in plain text, potentially exposing sensitive information.
item.description: IBM Security QRadar EDR 3.12 through 3.12.24 stores user credentials in plain text which can be read by a local privileged user.

item.title: CVE-2026-3341 · 5.4 MEDIUM — IBM Langflow Desktop 1.0.0 - 1.9.2 DNS Rebinding Bypasses SSRF Protection Allowing Access to Internal Services
item.description: IBM Langflow Desktop 1.0.0 through 1.9.2 IBM Langflow is vulnerable to server-side request forgery (SSRF). This may allow an authenticated attacker to send unauthorized requests from the system, potentially leading to network enumeration or facilitat…

item.title: CVE-2026-7787 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Session History Access via Public Flow Execution
item.description: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.9.1 could allow an authenticated user to read or modify sensitive information by bypassing authentication using insecure direct object references.

item.title: CVE-2026-7870 · 8.8 HIGH — IBM i is Affected by Privilege Escalation []
item.description: IBM i 7.6, 7.5, 7.4, and 7.3 could allow a user to gain elevated privileges due to an unqualified library call. A malicious actor could cause user-controlled code to run with administrator privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-9330 · 8.5 HIGH — IBM WebSphere Application Server is affected by remote code execution
item.description: IBM WebSphere Application Server 9.0, and 8.5 is affected by an improper validation of user-supplied data during deserialization using the SAML Web Single Sign-On component. This could result in remote code execution via a crafted HTTP request when c…

item.title: CVE-2026-9319 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — IBM WebSphere Application Server is affected by a remote code execution vulnerability
item.description: IBM WebSphere Application Server 9.0, and 8.5 is vulnerable to potential remote code execution due to deserialization of untrusted data via JAX-WS endpoints with WS-Security.

item.title: CVE-2026-9311 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — IBM WebSphere Application Server is affected by remote code execution
item.description: IBM WebSphere Application Server 9.0, and 8.5 is vulnerable to remote code execution caused by the bypass of security controls.

item.title: CVE-2026-8644 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — IBM WebSphere Application Server is affected by an identity spoofing vulnerability
item.description: IBM WebSphere Application Server 9.0, and 8.5 is vulnerable to identity spoofing.

item.title: CVE-2026-7770 · 8.8 HIGH — IBM i Access Client Solutions (ACS) is vulnerable to remote code execution when configured to listen for requests from IBM i Navigator
item.description: IBM i Access Family 1.1.5.0 through 1.1.9.12 IBM i Access Client Solutions (ACS) is vulnerable to remote code execution when configured to listen for requests from IBM i Navigator.

item.title: CVE-2026-1248 · 4.3 MEDIUM — IBM Business Automation Workflow information leak
item.description: IBM Business Automation Workflow containers and traditional may leak information about its database structure in error messages.

item.title: CVE-2026-7876 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Authentication bypass vulnerability found in Aspera High-Speed Transfer Server for Cloud Pak for Integration
item.description: IBM Aspera HSTS for CP4I 1.5.1 through 1.5.19

item.title: CVE-2026-7365 · 8.4 HIGH — IBM Operations Analytics - Log Analysis is affected by Information disclosure due to default passwords not being forced to be changed on post-installation
item.description: IBM Operations Analytics - Log Analysis and IBM SmartCloud Analytics - Log Analysis uses default passwords default passwords from the manufacturing process for use during the installation process, which could allow an attacker to bypass authenticatio…

item.title: CVE-2024-56462 · 7.2 HIGH — IBM QRadar SIEM is vulnerable to using components with known vulnerabilities
item.description: IBM QRadar 7.5.0 through 7.5.0 UP15 Interim Fix 002 could allow a privileged user to upload a malicious backup archive that could be restored and used to gain access to the underlying operating system.

item.title: CVE-2024-40684 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — IBM Operations Analytics - Log Analysis is affected by Weak Password Policy and Inadequate Account Lockout Mechanism
item.description: IBM Operations Analytics - Log Analysis 1.3.5.0, 1.3.5.1, 1.3.5.2, 1.3.5.3, 1.3.6.0, 1.3.6.1, 1.3.7.0, 1.3.7.1, 1.3.7.2, and 1.3.8.0, 1.3.8.1, 1.3.8.2, 1.3.8.3, 1.3.8.4 IBM SmartCloud Analytics - Log Analysis does not require that users should have s…

item.title: CVE-2024-28765 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Security vulnerability was found in IBM Security Directory Integrator
item.description: IBM SDI 7.2.0.0 through 7.2.0.14 and IBM Security Directory Integrator 10.0.0.0 through 10.0.0.2 could allow a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information when a detailed technical error message is returned in the browser. This information could…

item.title: CVE-2026-9035 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Multiple vulnerabilities in Aspera applications.
item.description: IBM Aspera High-Speed Transfer Endpoint 3.7.4 through 4.4.7 Fix Pack 1 and IBM Aspera High-Speed Transfer Server 3.7.4 through 4.4.7 Fix Pack 1 and IBM Aspera High-Speed Transfer Endpoint are affected by a potential arbitrary file read in the asperah…

item.title: CVE-2026-8405 · 6.5 MEDIUM — IBM Guardium Data Protection is affected by Exposure of Sensitive Information vulnerability
item.description: IBM Guardium Data Protection 12.2.1, and 12.2.2 's add-on feature of Guardium Data Protection named "Long Term Retention" (LTR) can expose sensitive credentials in debug mode.

item.title: CVE-2026-8180 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Multiple vulnerabilities in Aspera applications.
item.description: IBM Aspera High-Speed Transfer Endpoint 3.7.4 through 4.4.7 Fix Pack 1 and IBM Aspera High-Speed Transfer Server 3.7.4 through 4.4.7 Fix Pack 1 and IBM Aspera High-Speed Transfer Endpoint are affected by a potential denial of service in the asperahtt…

item.title: CVE-2026-8179 · 8.8 HIGH — Multiple vulnerabilities in Aspera applications.
item.description: IBM Aspera High-Speed Transfer Endpoint 3.7.4 through 4.4.7 Fix Pack 1 and IBM Aspera High-Speed Transfer Server 3.7.4 through 4.4.7 Fix Pack 1 and IBM Aspera High-Speed Transfer Endpoint are affected by a buffer overflow in the asperahttpd component…

item.title: CVE-2026-8175 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Multiple vulnerabilities in Aspera applications.
item.description: IBM Aspera High-Speed Transfer Endpoint 3.7.4 through 4.4.7 Fix Pack 1 and IBM Aspera High-Speed Transfer Server 3.7.4 through 4.4.7 Fix Pack 1 and IBM Aspera High-Speed Transfer Endpoint are affected by a buffer overflow in the asperahttpd component…

item.title: CVE-2026-7528 · 7.1 HIGH — Unauthenticated File Upload Vulnerability Allows Disk Space Exhaustion and Path Disclosure in Langflow OSS
item.description: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.9.0 could allow a denial of service due to uncontrolled resource consumption.

item.title: CVE-2026-7524 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Path Traversal Vulnerability in File Processing Components Allows Unauthorized File System Access and Potential Remote Code Execution
item.description: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.9.1 could allow remote code execution due to improper validation of symbolic links during archive extraction.

item.title: CVE-2026-7254 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Open BMC Denial of Service
item.description: IBM OPENBMC FW1110.00 through FW1110.11 is vulnerable to denial of service attacks by unauthenticated network users.

item.title: CVE-2026-6938 · 6.5 MEDIUM — IBM® Db2® is vulnerable to authorization bypass when uploading to a remote object storage path with a special query
item.description: IBM Db2 12.1.0 through 12.1.4 is vulnerable to authorization bypass when uploading to a remote object storage path with a special query.

item.title: CVE-2026-6936 · 6.5 MEDIUM — IBM i is Affected by a Denial of Service Vulnerability []
item.description: IBM i 7.6, 7.5, 7.4, and 7.3 s vulnerable to a denial-of-service attack due to uncontrolled recursion in the Integrated Language Environment (ILE) compiler. An authenticated attacker could exploit this vulnerability by compiling specially crafted sou…

item.title: CVE-2026-6053 · 5.5 MEDIUM — IBM® Db2® is vulnerable to a denial of service when a specially crafted query is run with range partitioned tables
item.description: IBM Db2 11.5.0 through 11.5.9, and 12.1.0 through 12.1.4 is vulnerable to a denial of service when a specially crafted query is run with range partitioned tables.

item.title: CVE-2026-6052 · 6.5 MEDIUM — IBM® Db2® is vulnerable to running out of memory when executing certain queries with MDC tables
item.description: IBM Db2 11.5.0 through 11.5.9, and 12.1.0 through 12.1.4 is vulnerable to running out of memory when executing certain queries with MDC tables.

item.title: CVE-2026-6051 · 5.5 MEDIUM — IBM® Db2® is vulnerable to a denial of service when executing a specially crafted query with a small statement heap
item.description: IBM Db2 11.5.0 through 11.5.9, and 12.1.0 through 12.1.4 is vulnerable to a denial of service when executing a specially crafted query with a small statement heap.

item.title: CVE-2026-5516 · 4.4 MEDIUM — IBM WebSphere Application Server Liberty is affected by a security bypass vulnerability
item.description: IBM WebSphere Application Server - Liberty 22.0.0.11 through 26.0.0.5 IBM WebSphere Application Server Liberty could allow a remote attacker to bypass security under limited conditions by exploiting a specific timing window.

item.title: CVE-2026-5515 · 5.5 MEDIUM — IBM App Connect Enterprise is vulnerable to a confidential disclosure
item.description: IBM App Connect Enterprise 13.0.1.0 through 13.0.7.0 stores potentially sensitive information in log files that could be read by a local user.

item.title: CVE-2026-5065 · 8.8 HIGH — IBM Controller is affected by vulnerabilities
item.description: IBM Controller 11.0.1, 11.1.0, 11.1.1, and 11.1.2 contains hard-coded credentials, such as a password or cryptographic key, which it uses for its own inbound authentication, outbound communication to external components, or encryption of internal dat…

item.title: CVE-2026-4410 · 4.8 MEDIUM — IBM WebSphere Application Server and WebSphere Application Server Liberty are affected by a denial of service
item.description: IBM WebSphere Application Server - Liberty 19.0.0.7 through 26.0.0.5 and IBM WebSphere Application Server 9.0, and 8.5 and WebSphere Application Server Liberty are vulnerable to a denial of service, caused by sending a specially-crafted request. A re…

item.title: CVE-2026-3676 · 6.5 MEDIUM — There are multiple vulnerabilities in IBM DB2 bundled with IBM Application Performance Management products.
item.description: IBM Cloud APM, Base Private 8.1.4 and IBM Cloud APM, Advanced Private 8.1.4 IBM Db2 for Linux, UNIX and Windows (includes DB2 Connect Server) could allow an authenticated user to cause a denial of service due to improper neutralization of special ele…

item.title: CVE-2026-3623 · 7.8 HIGH — Vulnerabilities exists in IBM Netezza Performance Server Replication Services
item.description: IBM Netezza Performance Server Replication Services 3.0.2.0 through 3.0.5.0 allows an attacker with low‑privileged access to escalate their privileges to root. By exploiting this flaw, the attacker can execute root‑level commands, obtain a root shell…

item.title: CVE-2026-3366 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — InfoSphere Optim Test Data Fabrication is affected by Arbitrary File Read
item.description: IBM InfoSphere Optim Test Data Fabrication 1.0.0, 1.0.0.1, 1.0.0.2, 1.0.2, 1.0.2.2, 1.0.2.3, 1.0.2.4, 1.0.2.5, 1.0.2.6, 1.0.2.7 could allow a remote attacker to traverse directories on the system. An attacker could send a specially crafted URL reques…

item.title: CVE-2026-2607 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Multiple vulnerabilities in IBM MQ Operator and Queue manager container images
item.description: IBM MQ Operator SC2: v3.2.0 through 3.2.23CD: v3.3.0, v3.4.0, v3.4.1, v3.5.0, v3.5.1 - v3.5.3, v3.6.0 - v3.6.4, v3.7.0 - v3.7.2, v3.8.0, v3.8.1, v3.9.0, v3.9.1LTS: v2.0.0 - 2.0.29 and IBM supplied MQ Advanced container images SC2: 9.4.0.6 through r1,…

item.title: CVE-2026-1718 · 7.1 HIGH — IBM® Db2® is vulnerable to a denial of service with a specially crafted query when running an AUTONOMOUS procedure
item.description: IBM Db2 11.5.0 through 11.5.9, and 12.1.0 through 12.1.4 is vulnerable to a denial of service with a specially crafted query when autonomous transactions are enabled.

item.title: CVE-2025-3633 · 5.4 MEDIUM — IBM Cognos Analytics is affected by multiple security vulnerabilities
item.description: IBM Cognos Analytics 11.2.0, 11.2.4, 12.0, and 12.1.0 and IBM Cognos Transformer 11.2.4, 12.0, and 12.1.0 are vulnerable to cross-site scripting (XSS). This vulnerability allows a remote attacker to inject arbitrary JavaScript code into the web user…

item.title: CVE-2026-3660 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — IBM Engineering Lifecycle Management - Jazz Foundation is vulnerable to Authentication Bypass
item.description: IBM Engineering Lifecycle Management 7.0.3, 7.1.0, and 7.2.0 could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to update server property files that would allow them to gain unauthorized access to the application.

item.title: CVE-2026-3603 · 7.1 HIGH — IBM Engineering Lifecycle Management - Jazz Foundation is vulnerable to XML external entity injection (XXE) attack
item.description: IBM Engineering Lifecycle Management 7.0.3 Interim Fix 001 through Interim Fix 021, 7.1.0 Interim Fix 001 through Interim Fix 009, and 7.2.0 and 7.2.0 Interim Fix 001 is vulnerable to an XML external entity injection (XXE) attack when processing XML…

item.title: CVE-2026-4051 · 7.2 HIGH — IBM Engineering Lifecycle Management - Jazz Foundation is vulnerable to Server Post-Auth Remote Code Execution
item.description: IBM Engineering Lifecycle Management 7.0.3, 7.1.0, and 7.2.0 could allow an attacker with administrative privileges to execute remote code due to exposed method that is not properly restricted.

item.title: CVE-2026-9170 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — IBM HTTP Server is affected by multiple vulnerabilities
item.description: IBM HTTP Server 8.5, and 9.0

item.title: CVE-2026-8633 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — IBM WebSphere Application Server and WebSphere Application Server Liberty are affected by multiple vulnerabilities when using when using Web Server Plug-ins
item.description: IBM Web Server Plug-ins for WebSphere Application Server and WebSphere Liberty 8.5, 9.0 IBM WebSphere Application Server and WebSphere Application Server Liberty are vulnerable to remote code execution in the Web Server Plug-ins, through a specially…

item.title: CVE-2026-8620 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — IBM WebSphere Application Server and WebSphere Application Server Liberty are affected by multiple vulnerabilities when using when using Web Server Plug-ins
item.description: IBM Web Server Plug-ins for WebSphere Application Server and WebSphere Liberty 8.5, 9.0 IBM WebSphere Application Server and WebSphere Application Server Liberty are vulnerable to HTTP request smuggling in the Web Server Plug-ins through a specially…

item.title: CVE-2026-8835 · 7.3 HIGH — IBM HTTP Server is affected by multiple vulnerabilities
item.description: IBM HTTP Server 8.5, and 9.0 is vulnerable to invalid pointer dereference. A privileged user, authenticated to the Administration Server, could exploit this vulnerability to expose sensitive information or cause a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2026-8834 · 8 HIGH — IBM HTTP Server is affected by multiple vulnerabilities
item.description: IBM HTTP Server 8.5, and 9.0 contains a buffer overflow vulnerability. A privileged user, authenticated to the Administration Server, could exploit this vulnerability to execute remote code or cause a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2026-8855 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — IBM HTTP Server is affected by multiple vulnerabilities
item.description: IBM HTTP Server 8.5, and 9.0 is vulnerable to remote code execution and denial of service in configurations with TLS mutual authentication (client authentication).

item.title: CVE-2026-8854 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — IBM HTTP Server is affected by multiple vulnerabilities
item.description: IBM HTTP Server 8.5, and 9.0 is vulnerable to denial of service via the optional module mod_mem_cache.

item.title: CVE-2026-8856 · 7.7 HIGH — IBM HTTP Server is affected by multiple vulnerabilities
item.description: IBM HTTP Server 8.5, and 9.0 is vulnerable to denial of service in configurations where an attacker has write access to parts of the server configuration.

item.title: CVE-2026-8852 · 6.2 MEDIUM — IBM HTTP Server is affected by multiple vulnerabilities
item.description: IBM HTTP Server 8.5, and 9.0 is vulnerable to denial of service via the optional module mod_fastcgi module.
